description: The Contact page does not load properly — it crashes, shows a blank area, or an error instead of the contact form. The form cannot be used at all.
expectedOutcome: The Contact page should load and display the contact form with empty fields so the user can fill and submit it.
hint: The form state is used for form.name, form.email, form.message etc. — it must be initialized to an object with those keys, not left undefined.
symptom: Contact page crashes or the form never appears; opening /contact breaks the page.
solution: Initialize the form state with an object that has all fields the code expects: useState({ name: '', email: '', subject: '', message: '' }). Do not leave useState() with no argument.
solutionCode: const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', email: '', subject: '', message: '' })
